finding_results.notes: Replaced three mirrored echo patterns with asymmetrical responses: (1) 'Only there' echo replaced by Vel's silence, and 'If it's done right' echo replaced by Vel's consequence-adding line about dying in a field plus casual 'So yeah' confirmation; (2) stepped 'No' / 'I did' confirmations collapsed into Kem's compound statement and Vel's single 'Yeah'; (3) 'No Ledger' / 'No Ledger' / 'No abilities' / 'No' four-line echo chain collapsed into Kem stating both facts in one turn and Vel responding with a physical beat instead of verbal confirmation. All key facts preserved: location-specificity of the threshold, requirement for correct conditions, zero not sufficient alone, Vel witnessed a crossing, no Ledger and no abilities beyond. Turn-shapes now vary through silence, action-against-dialogue, and asymmetrical replies.

summary: Broke three catechism-pattern echo pairs in the campfire revelation scene by replacing mirrored confirmations with silence, physical beats, asymmetrical responses, and condensed compound statements. The scene communicates the same threshold facts but no longer reads as arranged call-and-response. All revisions stay within Vel's and Kem's established voice profiles.
